And that's ultimately how you continue. Some of you should already know this, like first you were training, which you can pay someone $15 an hour for. Once you learn how to sell, then all of a sudden in an hour you can make $500 and then cover all the training sessions for an afternoon for an entire week. So in that hour, you're able to generate more value and then buy your time back. The next most valuable skill above sales is going to be making a rain, generating increase, generating demand. And so that's what Lea Generation is all about and that's from the external marketplace as well as internal, meaning if you can get members to refer to the matter of this module will be how to take eyeballs externally, pay for the ad placements and turn those eyeballs into clicks, into conversions, into paying customers.
